task: LoRA fine-tuning for input parsing: user text -> intent/item/amount/action JSON

examples.improvement: item is clean and amount is numeric
ledger intent, item and numeric amount are extracted

known_limitations: Terminal pasted log contains mojibake because of encoding, but the semantic output was verified from screenshots.
intent/action still output Chinese labels instead of fixed enum values like price_audit and ledger_add.
No automated test metrics were produced yet; current evidence is training log plus manual inference examples.
recommended_next_steps: Add stronger enum-label examples and negative samples.
Run a small evaluation script on the 50 test samples.
Use the parser before intent_router and keep the original rules as fallback.
